calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of Minors and Name Change for Adult parent.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Petitioners Xi Chen and Julia Lin present in pro per as Guardians Ad Litem for the minor Kevin Chen and Kenneth Chen who were present at today's hearing.

Petitioners were placed under oath and testified.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to Kevin Hong-Wen Chen and Kenneth hong Wen Chen.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Petitioner Xi Chen was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Jesse Xi Chen.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
